prompt:
Design a stunning Apple-inspired glassmorphism executive dashboard called "ANJANI AI" for a PP woven fabric manufacturing CEO. This should feel like a first-party Apple executive product вҖ” think visionOS design language meets manufacturing intelligence.

DESIGN PHILOSOPHY: "Clarity through layers." Frosted glass surfaces create depth. Generous whitespace. Everything feels light, refined, and intentional. The CEO feels calm and in control.

COLOR SYSTEM:
- Background: Deep navy-slate #0b1326 (NOT pure black вҖ” slightly warm, sophisticated)
- Glass cards: backdrop-blur(24px), bg-white/[0.04], 1px border white/10, rounded-2xl
- Primary cyan: #55e6ff (data, active states, primary actions)
- Secondary violet: #8b5cf6 (AI insights, knowledge, trends)
- Emerald: #10b981 (revenue, online, confirmed)
- Amber: #f59e0b (pending, attention needed)
- Red: #ef4444 (urgent escalations)

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

LAYOUT: Bentobox grid system. Asymmetric modular cards. Desktop 1440x900.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

ROW 1 вҖ” Priority Alerts (auto-hiding when empty):
Horizontal banner with red-to-amber gradient left border. Shows critical items:
- "вҡ пёҸ Nikhil needs menu reply вҖ” 22m ago" with Reply button
- "рҹ’° Confirm вӮ№1.64L payment вҖ” Rahul" with Confirm button
- "рҹ’° Confirm вӮ№83.5K payment вҖ” Priya" with Confirm button

Each alert: glass pill, colored dot, customer name, action needed, time, inline action button.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

ROW 2 вҖ” KPI Hero Cards (4 cards in a row):

Card 1 "Total Revenue": вӮ№12,45,800 вҖ” +18.2% (green arrow up) вҖ” mini sparkline chart inside card showing upward trend

Card 2 "Active Customers": 54 вҖ” +7 this week вҖ” mini bar chart showing weekly growth

Card 3 "Production Util.": 67% вҖ” -3% vs last month вҖ” beautiful SVG donut gauge with cyan glowing stroke

Card 4 "Avg Order Value": вӮ№82,300 вҖ” +5.1% вҖ” trend line chart

Each KPI card: Large hero number top-left, mini chart in background at low opacity, trend indicator chip bottom-right. Frosted glass with subtle hover glow. Generous internal padding (24px).

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

ROW 3 вҖ” Split Bento (2/3 + 1/3):

LEFT (2/3) вҖ” "WhatsApp Customer Hub":
This is the CHAT MONITORING section. Split into two halves:

TOP HALF: "Live Conversations" вҖ” horizontal scrollable row of 6 customer chat cards
- Each card: customer avatar (initials in gradient circle), name, company, last message preview
- Green pulsing dot if conversation is active/OPEN
- New message badge count (cyan pill)
- Clicking a card opens full chat view

BOTTOM HALF: Selected chat conversation view
- Message bubbles: customer messages (left, glass style), owner replies (right, cyan gradient)
- System/status messages centered in tiny glass pills
- Timestamps below each message (tiny, slate-500)
- Reply input bar at bottom: "Reply via WhatsApp..." with Send button
- "Ravi AI" agent status indicator вҖ” green pulsing dot + "AI monitoring" text

RIGHT (1/3) вҖ” "Production Overview":
- Large glowing donut gauge: 67% filled, cyan stroke with drop-shadow glow
- Center of donut: "67%" in large bold text
- Below: "135T booked / 202T capacity"
- Metadata line: "June 2026 В· 45 looms В· 150 kg/day each"
- Mini capacity trend line below

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

ROW 4 вҖ” Orders Table + Activity Feed (50/50 split):

LEFT вҖ” "Recent Orders":
Clean glass table, 4 rows:
- Customer name, specs (size/g/quality), amount (вӮ№), status badge, action
- Statuses: "Awaiting Payment" (amber, with Confirm button), "In Production" (blue), "Completed" (emerald)
- Hover: row highlights with subtle cyan tint

RIGHT вҖ” "Live Intelligence Feed":
Vertical timeline with colored icon circles:
- рҹ”ө Ravi replied to Nikhil (WhatsApp) вҖ” 2m ago
- рҹҹЈ Quote generated вӮ№83,500 вҖ” 8m ago
- рҹҹў Production started Order #8 вҖ” 15m ago
- рҹ”ҙ Escalation: Nikhil needs menu help вҖ” 22m ago
- рҹҹў Payment confirmed вӮ№1.64L вҖ” 1h ago

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

FLOATING ELEMENTS:

1. AI Assistant FAB (bottom-right): Sparkles icon button, fixed position. Glowing cyan ring. Clicking opens a 400px glassmorphism slide-in drawer from right edge:
   - "AI Executive Assistant" header
   - Chat interface to query business: "Show revenue", "Pending payments", etc.
   - AI responds with data cards

2. Command Palette (Cmd+K): Modal overlay with glass background, search input at top. Quick commands with keyboard shortcuts:
   - "Show revenue" вҢҳR
   - "Pending payments" вҢҳP
   - "Production capacity" вҢҳC
   - "Customer pipeline" вҢҳL
   - "Create quote" вҢҳQ
   - "Open AI assistant" вҢҳJ

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

STYLE: Apple-inspired premium. Generous whitespace (minimum 24px internal padding). Subtle animations вҖ” cards have gentle hover lifts (2px y, increased glow). Everything softened and refined. Professional, calm, confident. The glassmorphism should feel like looking through a pristine window into your business.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- All Inter font family
- Display numbers: 48px, weight 700, letter-spacing -0.02em
- Headlines: 24-32px, weight 600
- Body: 14-16px, weight 400
- Labels: 12px, weight 500, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em
- All currency in Indian Rupee (вӮ№)

Make every glass surface feel like a piece of art. The WhatsApp chat integration should feel as polished as iMessage.

DEVICE: Desktop 1440x900
